nodes.name: design-priority-three.md
nodes.summary: Superseded v1 three-in-one design proposal covering the bill data schema, the three-tier time/session clock model, and the media/public-opinion layer; archived after its content was split and revised into standalone v2 design docs.
nodes.languageNotes: Section 1 (Bill Schema) was extracted verbatim into docs/design/bill-model.md; sections 2 (time/session model) and 3 (media/opinion layer) were superseded by newer v2 designs in docs/design/time-model.md and docs/design/media-model.md respectively, per docs/README.md.
